dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HR 5344 RH: Kleptocracy Asset Recovery Rewards Program Act
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

action.action-desc: Mr. Lynch (for himself and Mr. Nunn of Iowa) introduced the following bill; which was referred to the Committee on Financial Services
Reported with an amendment, committed to the Committee of the Whole House on the State of the Union, and ordered to be printed
action.action-instruction: Strike out all after the enacting clause and insert the part printed in italic
For text of introduced bill, see copy of bill as introduced on September 15, 2025

form.official-title: To amend the Kleptocracy Asset Recovery Rewards Act to extend the Kleptocracy Asset Recovery Rewards Pilot Program, and for other purposes.

section.text: This Act may be cited as the Kleptocracy Asset Recovery Rewards Program Act.

subsection.text: Section 9703 of the Kleptocracy Asset Recovery Rewards Act (31 U.S.C. note prec. 9701) is amended—

paragraph.text: in the heading, by striking Kleptocracy Asset Recovery Rewards Pilot Program and inserting Kleptocracy Asset Recovery Rewards Program;
in subsection (a)(1), by striking ‘Kleptocracy Asset Recovery Rewards Pilot Program’ and inserting ‘Kleptocracy Asset Recovery Rewards Program;
in subsection (g)(1), by striking for 3 years; and
by striking subsection (i) and inserting the following:

subsection.text: This section shall cease to have any force or effect after the end of the 7-year period beginning on the date of enactment of the Kleptocracy Asset Recovery Rewards Program Act.

The table of contents in section 2(b) and in title XCVII of the National Defense Authorization Act for Fiscal Year 2021 are each amended, in the item relating to section 9703, by striking Kleptocracy Asset Recovery Rewards Pilot Program and inserting Kleptocracy Asset Recovery Rewards Program.

endorsement.action-desc: Reported with an amendment, committed to the Committee of the Whole House on the State of the Union, and ordered to be printed
